import (
	"bufio"
	"encoding/binary"
	"fmt"
	"hash/crc32"
	"io"
	"os"
	"sync"
)

// WALEntry represents a single key-value pair in the WAL.

	Key   string
	Value string
}

// WAL is a write-ahead log for a key-value store.
type WAL struct {
	path           string
	file           *os.File
	buf            *bufio.Writer
	mu             sync.Mutex
	currentOffset  int64
	lastSyncOffset int64
	closeCh
